description: Capabilities for per-workspace webview windows: workspace-* are locally-supervised chan serves, outbound-* are explicit URL attachments, terminal-* are standalone embedded-served terminal-only windows, control-terminal-* are the embedded terminal-only windows that run a devserver's connect script, local::<window_id> are watcher-opened embedded-served workspace windows, lib-<hex>::<window_id> are watcher-opened devserver windows (both the library-minted window scheme). control-terminal-* needs request_close_window so Cmd+W / the not-connected close button surveys re-run vs abandon (the connected-phase exit fires from a desktop-side watcher, no IPC).
